.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.io.*; before import java.net.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant declarations for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH to single lines.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in final String assignments.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard Java coding style.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks for new Authenticator() { ... }

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Removed trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Deleted empty line after closing brace of class.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLFLogConverter.CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to log statement to prevent log injection vulnerabilities or formatting issues.
Modify active profiles logging to show default profiles if no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in log message string to fix syntax or improve readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed "'{}'" to "'{}'" (removing backslash escapes) in the error log format string.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the configuration properties class to allow automated code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Clean up imports that are no longer used in the class after other refactoring or removal of profile-based configuration.
Update Cassandra driver data type from ASCII to TEXT to ensure compatibility with newer driver versions or schema expectations.
Remove the import for the ProblemModule from the Zalando problem library.
Remove the import for the ConstraintViolationProblemModule from the Zalando problem library.
Remove the Spring bean definition for the ProblemModule Jackson module.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Bean public ProblemModule problemModule() { return new ProblemModule(); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the Spring bean definition for the ConstraintViolationProblemModule Jackson module.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: @Bean public ConstraintViolationProblemModule constraintViolationProblemModule() { return new ConstraintViolationProblemModule(); }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Source Content Security Policy directives from JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them in the configuration.
Change frame options from deny to sameOrigin to align with modern SPA requirements.
Add explicit authorization rule for /v3/api-docs/** requiring ADMIN authority.
Update static resource matching patterns to explicitly permit common web assets like .js, .css, .png, etc.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific extensions like '/*.js', '/*.css' and adjusted wildcards for content and i18n

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify type checking and casting logic.
Remove try-catch block for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration to check for allowedOriginPatterns in addition to allowedOrigins, supporting newer Spring Security CORS handling.
Update CORS registration paths to reflect the migration from Swagger 2 (v2/api-docs) to OpenAPI 3 (v3/api-docs) and Swagger UI changes.
Refine the package-info.java documentation to be more generic and accurate.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed comment from 'Spring Framework configuration files.' to 'Application configuration.'
